//: Standalone, minimal tsconfig used ONLY to transpile the self-contained sanitizer modules into ESM JavaScript that the CommonJS fuzz targets load via dynamic import(). It deliberately does NOT extend ../tsconfig.base.json so the fuzz build stays decoupled from the app's compiler/version specifics. Output lands in packages/cli/dist-fuzz/ (governed by packages/cli's "type": "module", so emit is ESM). Used by both `pnpm fuzz:build` locally and .clusterfuzzlite/build.sh in CI.
